evals.prompt: Build an email campaign for stripe.com targeting John Doe at Stripe, and verify john@stripe.com.
evals.expected_output: A 7-step routed run that finds companies, pulls domain emails, finds the person's email, verifies and bounce-checks it, enriches the lead, and pulls brand context.
assertions: The run uses the email-campaign skill manifest
All seven steps have rail 'routed'
Step calls hunter.io/hunter/domain-search, hunter.io/hunter/email-finder, and hunter.io/hunter/email-verifier via POST
The total cap does not exceed maxAmount 0.21
No step references 'orth', 'orth run', or api.orth.sh

evals.prompt: I just want to check whether jane@acme.com is deliverable before I send.
evals.expected_output: Verification routed through the Hunter email-verifier (deliverability pass and bounce-check pass), with the email param set to jane@acme.com.
assertions: The email param is bound to jane@acme.com
The Hunter email-verifier step targets hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-verifier with a JSON body containing email
The bounce check targets hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-verifier via POST

evals.prompt: Find the work email for Maria Lopez at notion.so.
evals.expected_output: Hunter email-finder routed step with domain=notion.so, first_name=Maria, last_name=Lopez.
assertions: The domain param is bound to notion.so
firstName resolves to Maria and lastName resolves to Lopez
The email-finder step is POST to hunter.io/hunter/email-finder

evals.prompt: Enrich a lead named Sam Carter at Figma so I can personalize my outreach.
evals.expected_output: Apollo people-enrichment routed step with the lead's name and organization, returning enrichment fields.
assertions: The Apollo step targets apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment via POST
The body includes first_name, last_name, and organization_name
The people-enrichment step cap is 0.10

evals.prompt: Find SaaS companies with 50-500 employees to start an outreach list.
evals.expected_output: Fiber company-search routed step filtered by industry SaaS and employee count 50-500.
assertions: The Fiber company-search step targets api.fiber.ai/v1/company-search via POST
The body searchParams includes the industry and employee_count_min/max filters
industry resolves to SaaS

evals.prompt: Get the brand colors and description for stripe.com for my outreach template.
evals.expected_output: Abstract Company Enrichment lookup routed POST with domain=stripe.com, returning firmographic context (industry, description, size); note that this merchant does not return brand assets like logos or colors.
assertions: The company-context step is POST to abstract-company-enrichment.mpp.paywithlocus.com/abstract-company-enrichment/lookup
The domain is passed in the JSON body bound to stripe.com
The step rail is 'routed'
